name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement

labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits — humans, AI Agents, both?

## Proposed Solution

How should it work? Include the proposed command line, flags and JSON output
shape if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information.
